gist.headline: Forging new tools
gist.blurb: A new community tool has entered the greenhouse! Pollenforge-CLI is here to help you hammer your Markdown into beautifully formatted output.
gist.summary: Added Pollenforge-CLI, a new community-built tool for converting Markdown content into formatted output, to the app showcase.
gist.impact: Developers can now discover Pollenforge-CLI in the community greenhouse to streamline their Markdown formatting workflows.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy blacksmith forge metaphor for 'Pollenforge'. The bee mascot acting as a tiny blacksmith, forging a document on an anvil. Represents the CLI tool formatting markdown.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, tapping a glowing document on a small anvil with a tiny hammer. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny blacksmith apron, tapping a glowing document on a small anvil with a tiny hammer. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
